violations.text: Dumpster area has an accumulation of leaf litter and wood. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The door to the downstairs adult toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils (knives and cutting boards) after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Establishment is lacking a 3 bay sink, and the dishwasher is not being used per PIC. All equipment and utensils must be returned to caterer, and disposables used to serve meals. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The dishwasher was not in good repair, nonfunctional during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2025
Establishment has no means to calibrate the food thermometer. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2024

The door to the outside, located in the main office, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2024
The refrigerator is not a commercial refrigeration unit. Commercial refrigerator has been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and vegetation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. List of approved food safety instructors given to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The hand-washing sink in the employee toilet room downstairs was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Milk was observed held at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Refrigerator temperature was decreased, and PIC will monitor temperature and call service if necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
Establishment has no means to calibrate the probe food thermometer. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The door to the outside, located in the main office area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2024
Food observed stored less than 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The refrigerator is not a commercial refrigeration unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator and table in kitchen have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
Dish machine in poor repair. Service order in place. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

String cheese was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the interior of the refrigerator have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinet shelving under kitchen sink have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

Refuse area observed with litter and dumpster lids open. An area for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
